findings.message: TASK-05 CSS override contract wrong: global.css uses --surface-1/2/3 and --color-fg-muted as underlying tokens; plan specified --color-surface-1/2/3 and --color-muted with hsl() wrappers
TASK-02 internally inconsistent: acceptance says LiveNewIdeasCount in page.tsx but Scouts says inside InProgressInbox
TASK-09 inProgressCount semantics ambiguous: allowing activePlans.length vs snoozed filter creates count drift with InProgressCountBadge
TASK-01 B3 claim wrong: InboxSection childCount already matches item count for .map() call sites
Plan marked auto-build eligible but TASK-07 is IMPLEMENT at 75% below threshold
TASK-02 materially improved — now ties B4 to real refresh payload in route.ts
